title: Kids Play Food Set with Shopping Baskets, 20+ Pieces, Fruits Vegetables and Groceries, Educational Pretend Kitchen Toys, Yellow
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes 20+ pieces featuring realistic plastic fruits, vegetables, and grocery items, plus two colourful shopping baskets for imaginative play
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Perfect for teaching children about food groups, colours, counting, and developing vocabulary through pretend grocery shopping
DURABLE DESIGN: Made from high-quality, child-safe plastic materials that are built to withstand regular play and easy to clean
STORAGE SOLUTION: Comes with two sturdy shopping baskets in blue and orange colours for convenient toy organization and storage
PLAY VARIETY: Set includes diverse items like fruits, vegetables, dessert boxes, beverages, and condiments for multiple play scenarios
description: Product Description Spark your child's imagination with this comprehensive Chef play food set! The collection includes a sturdy shopping basket in cheerful blue and yellow colours, filled with over 20 realistic-looking play pieces. From fresh fruits and vegetables to everyday groceries like milk tea and condiments, this set provides everything needed for engaging pretend shopping and cooking adventures. The colourful plastic pieces are sized perfectly for little hands and include items like apples, bananas, grapes, carrots, peppers, and even a croissant. The set also features miniature grocery items like sauce bottles and sweet treats, adding variety to playtime scenarios. These durable toys are ideal for role-play activities that help develop social skills, vocabulary, and basic counting abilities. The convenient shopping baskets make cleanup and storage simple while adding to the realistic shopping experience. Perfect for individual play or sharing with friends, this set provides hours of educational entertainment for young aspiring chefs and shopkeepers. Safety Warning Not Suitable for children under the age of 36 Months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
